zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst於1370年出生在英國肯特時，他的父親Sir Robert Pashley de Passele29歲，母親Anne Howard29歲。他於大約1400年與Philippa Sergeaux在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1407年2月12日在英國英格蘭素可享年37歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 馬比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst于1370年出生在英国肯特时，他的父亲Sir Robert Pashley de Passele29岁，母亲Anne Howard29岁。他于大约1400年与Philippa Sergeaux在英国英格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1407年2月12日在英国英格兰素可享年37岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 馬比。

nameMeanings.name: Pashley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French passe lewe ‘cross the water’, probably used for a seafarer or sailor. Compare Parslow . The name was sometimes treated like a Norman habitational name by adding the preposition de, although no such placename has been identified in Normandy or neighboring regions.

habitational name from Pashley in the parish of Ticehurst, Sussex. The placename is from Old English Pæcces + lēah ‘Pæcca's wood or clearing’. A district of Eastbourne, Sussex, bearing this name derives it from the surname; a family called Pashley had moved there from Ticehurst by the later part of the 13th century.

variants.name: Parslow
meanings: English: Anglicized form of the Old French nickname passe lewe ‘cross the water’; see Pashley .

variants.name: Pasley
meanings: Scottish: variant of Paisley . Black suggests also that some examples of Pasley and Paisley may be derived from a place known as Pasley or Howpasley, in the Borders region.
Possibly an altered form of German Pasler, a variant of Basler , or of Pässler, an occupational name, from an agent derivative of basteln ‘to do handicraft’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst was born in 1370, in Kent, England, his father, Sir Robert Pashley de Passele, was 29 and his mother, Anne Howard, was 29. He married Philippa Sergeaux about 1400, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 February 1407, in Sussex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst est né en 1370, à Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Pashley de Passele, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Howard, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Philippa Sergeaux environ 1400, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 février 1407, à Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à St Mabyn, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst 1370 in Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Pashley de Passele 29 und seine Mutter Anne Howard 29. Er hat um 1400 in England, United Kingdom Philippa Sergeaux geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Februar 1407 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Sussex, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Mabyn, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst è nato il nel 1370 nel Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Pashley de Passele, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne Howard, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Philippa Sergeaux circa 1400, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 febbraio 1407, nel Sussex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a St Mabyn, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurstが1370年にイギリスケントで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Pashley de Passeleは29歳，母Anne Howardは29歳であった。約1400年にイギリスイギリスでPhilippa Sergeauxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1407年2月12日にイギリスイギリススセックスで37歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト マブインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst(이)가 1370년 영국 켄트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Pashley de Passele(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Howard(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Philippa Sergeaux(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1407년 2월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 수세스에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 마빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst nasceu em 1370, em Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Pashley de Passele, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Howard, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Philippa Sergeaux aproximadamente 1400, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de fevereiro de 1407, em Sussex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst родился в 1370 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Pashley de Passele было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Howard, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Philippa Sergeaux около 1400 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 февраля 1407 г. в местности суссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мабин, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst nació en 1370, en Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Pashley de Passele, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne Howard, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Philippa Sergeaux aproximadamente 1400, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de febrero de 1407, en Sussex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultado en St Mabyn, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
